sections.paragraph:
- Original: πέραν

- Transliteration: Peran

- Phonetic: per'-an

- Definition:

1. beyond, on the other side

- Origin: "apparently accusative case of an obsolete derivative of peiro (to "pierce")"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Apparently the accusative case of an obsolete derivation of πείρω peirō (to peirce); through (as adverb or preposition) that is across: - beyond farther (other) side over.
